basic_details.job_title: CMHO Raipur NHM Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 206 Nursing Officer, Community Health Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of Chief Medical and Health Officer (CMHO), District Raipur, Chhattisgarh
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Document Verification + Written Exam / Skill Test / Merit, as applicable per post
basic_details.short_information: CMHO Raipur NHM Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Office of Chief Medical and Health Officer (CMHO), District Raipur, Chhattisgarh has released the NHM Recruitment 2026 notification for 206 vacancies across various posts including Nursing Officer, Staff Nurse, Community Health Officer, ANM, RMA, Laboratory Technician, MPW, Secretarial Assistant, Class-IV, and other posts. The recruitment is being conducted under Reference No. N.H.M./H.R./2026/22562 on a contractual basis.

important_dates.walk-in dates: 28 July 2026 to 31 August 2026 (post-wise, see schedule below)
important_dates.reporting time on walk-in day: By 9:00 AM (candidates must arrive at least half an hour before the scheduled time)
important_dates.09:00 am – 11:00 am: Registration and document verification (applications received after this time will not be considered)

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid via a Demand Draft (DD) from any Nationalized Bank, issued in favour of "Jila Swasthya Samiti, Raipur" (District Health Committee, Raipur), and attached with the application. The fee is non-refundable. DDs issued in any other name will not be accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and separate DD for each post. The DD number, date, and amount must be mentioned in the application form. Applications without the fee (DD) will be rejected.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 64 years Age will be calculated as on 01 January 2026 (the contract reference year).

qualification.details: Eligibility varies by post. Common conditions across all posts:

vacancy_details.Post Name: Nursing Officer - ICU (Nurses in Emergency Care)

vacancy_details.Qualification Summary: 12th Passed, ANM course passed from an INC-affiliated training center, with live registration in the CG Nursing Registration Council
BSc Nursing/Post Basic BSc Nursing or GNM course passed, with live registration in the CG Nursing Council
M.Sc Psychiatric Nursing, OR BSc Nursing with a Diploma in Psychiatric Nursing; registration with the Nursing Council is mandatory
Practitioner in Modern and Holistic Medicine (PMHM) course passed and registered with the Chhattisgarh Medical Council
BSc Nursing/Post Basic BSc Nursing or GNM course passed, with live registration in the CG Nursing Council
D.M.L.T./B.M.L.T./Paramedical Course in Pathology, with registration in the CG Paramedical Council
Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T.)
Bachelor of Audiology & Speech Language Pathology (BASLP) or B.Sc (Speech and Hearing) from an RCI-recognized institute
PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Counseling/Health Education/Mass Communication/Social Science
BSc Nursing Certificate in Community Health Integrated Course, or Post Basic BSc Nursing Certificate in Community Health Integrated Course, with live Nursing Council registration
10+2 with Science subject; plus X-Ray Technician/Radiographer course recognized by the CG Government; live registration as Radiographer/X-Ray Technician from the CG Paramedical Council required
8th Passed
BSc Nursing or GNM course passed, with live registration in the CG Nursing Council
10+2 with Biology subject passed; plus one-year Diploma in Multipurpose Worker Training or equivalent training, registered with the Chhattisgarh Paramedical Council
12th Passed with at least one year computer diploma
Bachelor's Degree in any discipline with a one-year Computer Diploma from a recognized University/Institute
10th Passed

M.Phil in Clinical Psychology; if unavailable, M.A/M.Sc Psychology or M.A Rehabilitation Psychology with mandatory Rehabilitation Council of India registration and two years' work experience in a mental health hospital/clinic. A Diploma in Community Mental Health (Clinical Psychology) is given priority as an additional qualification.

12th Passed (any stream) or 10th Passed with a two-year diploma; plus a one-year Diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming; minimum typing speed of 8000 key depressions/hour in Hindi and English; 2 years' experience in Data Entry & Handling
10+2 with Science subject; plus a Certificate in Refrigeration and Air Conditioning from an ITI with two years' experience, or a Diploma in Cooling & Air Conditioning
8th Passed with 2 years' work experience

salary_details.details: Salary (consolidated monthly remuneration) ranges from Rs. 8,800 to Rs. 31,500 depending on the post, as detailed in the vacancy table above. No allowance or facility other than the fixed monthly remuneration as per the prescribed ROP (Record of Proceedings) will be payable during the contract period.

how_to_apply: Download the application form from the notification or the district website: www.raipur.gov.in
Fill the application form completely, attach a self-attested passport-size photograph, and sign the declaration.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates, mark sheets, and experience proof.
Obtain a Demand Draft of the prescribed fee amount, drawn in favour of "Jila Swasthya Samiti, Raipur" from any Nationalized Bank.
Mention the DD number, date, and amount in the application form.
Report to the designated walk-in venue on the scheduled date for the applied post, by 9:00 AM, carrying original documents and self-attested copies.
Complete registration, document verification, and the written/skill exam as per the daily time schedule.
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and a separate DD for each post, on the respective scheduled dates.

content_sections.text: Note: The number of vacancies for these 33 post types may increase or decrease as per requirement. PWBD (Persons with Benchmark Disability) sub-quotas within the UR/SC/ST/OBC columns are marked in the official notification with codes: OL – One Leg, LC – Leprosy Cured, OA – One Arm, F – Female, AAV – Acid Attack Victim, DW – Dwarfism, HH – Hearing Handicapped, LV – Low Vision, OAL – One Arm and One Leg.

content_sections.text: Fee must be paid via a Demand Draft (DD) from any Nationalized Bank, issued in favour of "Jila Swasthya Samiti, Raipur" (District Health Committee, Raipur), and attached with the application. The fee is non-refundable. DDs issued in any other name will not be accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and separate DD for each post. content_sections.heading: CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026 Daily Walk-in Time Schedule

rows.process: Registration and document verification (applications received after this time will not be considered)

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026 Walk-in
content_sections.text: 8th mark sheet (for Class IV posts and as date-of-birth proof) 10th mark sheet (date-of-birth proof) 12th mark sheet Mark sheets of all years for the minimum required educational qualification Mark sheet of the desired/preferred educational qualification, if applicable Live registration certificate from the relevant Chhattisgarh Council (Nursing/Paramedical/Medical), where applicable Permanent disability certificate issued by the District Medical Board in the prescribed format (for PWBD candidates) Valid caste certificate issued by a competent authority (for SC/ST/OBC candidates) Chhattisgarh state local resident certificate Experience certificate related to the applied post, if applicable (must clearly state the experience period, employer's valid email ID, and phone number) Identity proof (Aadhaar card, driving license, voter ID, passport, PAN card, etc.) Demand Draft for the prescribed application fee, in the correct name Original documents along with one self-attested photocopy of each, on the day of the walk-in

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the notification or the district website: www.raipur.gov.in Fill the application form completely, attach a self-attested passport-size photograph, and sign the declaration. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates, mark sheets, and experience proof. Obtain a Demand Draft of the prescribed fee amount, drawn in favour of "Jila Swasthya Samiti, Raipur" from any Nationalized Bank. Mention the DD number, date, and amount in the application form. Report to the designated walk-in venue on the scheduled date for the applied post, by 9:00 AM, carrying original documents and self-attested copies. Complete registration, document verification, and the written/skill exam as per the daily time schedule. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and a separate DD for each post, on the respective scheduled dates.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 206 vacancies across 33 types of contractual posts under the National Health Mission in District Raipur.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is walk-in only. There is no online application process; candidates must report in person with documents on their post's scheduled date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 64 years, calculated as on 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee ranges from Rs. 100 to Rs. 400 depending on category and the post's salary, payable only via Demand Draft in favour of "Jila Swasthya Samiti, Raipur."

faq.question: Q5. Is local domicile mandatory for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must be local residents of Chhattisgarh and must submit a local resident certificate at the time of document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on educational qualification marks, experience marks, and a written/skill exam, combined into a merit list, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the contract period for CMHO Raipur Recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The contract runs from the date of appointment until 31 March 2027, and may be extended based on annual performance evaluation.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply for more than one post in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, but candidates must submit a separate application and a separate application fee (DD) for each post, and attend the walk-in on each post's respective scheduled date.
